MonkeyMaker
by MonkeyNet
100%
Tap a layer to select it, then drag to move. Resize and rotate a selected layer with the sliders in the Text or Stickers tab.

Pick a monkey

Adds your monkey to the review queue. An admin approves it before it shows up for everyone.

Filter

Add some text, then select it to edit the font, size, rotation and color.

Tap to add

Drag stickers around the canvas after adding them.

Caption

Post it now

“Share to apps” opens your device’s share sheet so you can drop the meme straight into Instagram, X, WhatsApp, etc. with your caption attached.

Connect accounts

Connecting uses each platform’s official sign-in (OAuth) — MonkeyMaker never sees your password. Add your client IDs and backend URL to the OAUTH config to go live.
